citations.quote: The accommodation support service can: ... Provide a dedicated member of staff to provide information and to answer any related queries, or signpost you to a person or service to help you further
ENSA Advice ... can offer the following: Advice on how to find accommodation ... Look over leases and tenancy agreements ... Advice on tenant rights and responsibilities

findings.text: NAP-SRC-0014 describes a Private Accommodation Support Service offering advice, flat viewings, and signposting.
NAP-SRC-0014 describes ENSA Advice offering accommodation-finding help, lease review, and tenant rights advice.
No evidence in NAP-SRC-0014 that the brochure was provided to Anfal or that Anfal accessed any support service.
Only one source (NAP-SRC-0014) was provided; no other matter sources were available to search for records of brochure provision or support service access by Anfal.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Evidence Map: Brochure Provision / Support Service Access by Anfal

### Source Reviewed
- **NAP-SRC-0014** (Private Accommodation Brochure 2025): Describes support services but contains no records of provision to any individual.

### Findings
- F-001: Brochure describes Private Accommodation Support Service (supported, cit-001).
- F-002: Brochure describes ENSA Advice (supported, cit-002).
- F-003: No evidence of brochure provision to Anfal (uncertain).
- F-004: Only one source provided; other matter sources not searched (drafting note).

### Gaps
- No records of brochure provision to Anfal.
- No records of Anfal accessing support services.
- Other matter sources (e.g., emails, case notes, tenancy records) not yet searched.

### Proposed Next Step
- Search other matter sources for records of brochure provision or support service access by Anfal (see proposed task).
proposed_artifacts.title: Evidence Map for Brochure Provision / Support Service Access by Anfal

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search all available matter sources (e.g., emails, case notes, tenancy records, correspondence logs) for any record that the Private Accommodation Brochure 2025 (NAP-SRC-0014) was provided to Anfal, or that Anfal accessed the Private Accommodation Support Service or ENSA Advice. Report any findings with citations.
proposed_tasks.title: Search other matter sources for records of brochure provision or support service access by Anfal

risk_flags.description: Absence of evidence of brochure provision or support service access does not prove non-provision; other sources may exist.

summary: Reviewed NAP-SRC-0014 (Private Accommodation Brochure 2025) for brochure provision or support service access by Anfal. The brochure describes a Private Accommodation Support Service and ENSA Advice but contains no records of provision to any individual, including Anfal. No other matter sources were provided in this work order. A follow-up task is proposed to search other matter sources for evidence of brochure provision or support service access by Anfal.

uncertainties.description: Whether the brochure was provided to Anfal is unknown; no records of provision exist in the reviewed source.
Whether Anfal accessed the Private Accommodation Support Service or ENSA Advice is unknown; no records of access exist in the reviewed source.
Other matter sources (e.g., emails, case notes, tenancy records) were not provided in this work order and may contain relevant evidence.
